svg.text: THE CHILDREN'S COLLECTIVE OF FLORIDA · BRAND SYSTEM
The single approved wordmark — retire all other versions
REVERSED · on charcoal — heart stays coral
At 16–32 px the arc & dots collapse — the simplified mark stays clear.
The coral heart is preserved at every size.
Clear space ≥ x on all sides (x = the child's head height)
• Primary lockup ≥ 120 px wide (≈ 1.25 in print)
• Below 32 px → switch to the Simplified icon
• Clear space = x (head height) on all four sides
• One wordmark only — retire competing versions
• Text is charcoal-sage — never light sage on ivory
• Coral heart is permanent in the primary mark
✕ Never crop, recolor, rotate, or stretch the mark
Note: source art currently uses sage #6F8764 / coral #EF7F6D — align these to the official #6F8764 / #EF7F6D on the next export.
